name: openkb-pitboss-controller
description: Local Bluetooth controller for Pit Boss grills — no cloud, no account, no marketing.

scripts.icon: python scripts/make_icon.py && iconutil -c icns build/icon.iconset -o build/icon.icns
scripts.test: npm run build && node scripts/test-thermal.mjs && node scripts/test-shutdown.mjs && node scripts/test-maintenance.mjs && node scripts/test-config.mjs

extendInfo.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Pit Boss Grill connects to your grill over Bluetooth to read temperatures and send controls.
extendInfo.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Pit Boss Grill connects to your grill over Bluetooth to read temperatures and send controls.
